result: Universal basic curiosity: I'd wire every human brain with an unquenchable drive to seek truth, ask better questions, and collaborate on solving the universe's biggest mysteries. No more echo chambers, misinformation wars, or apathy—just relentless, joyful discovery. The world would level up fast.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
